caption: In a large, well-lit indoor hall with a high ceiling and an ornate chandelier, a group of people practice martial arts on a blue carpeted floor. Most of the practitioners wear traditional blue or white robes, while one individual on the right wears black. In the initial moments, several people hold long staffs, holding them horizontally across their shoulders or chests. As the sequence progresses, the practitioners shift their movements in synchronization. The central figure in white begins with their staff raised, then lowers their arms to their sides, and eventually extends them wide to the sides in a sweeping motion. Other participants in blue and black similarly transition from holding their weapons to open-armed stances. A crowd of spectators is visible in the background, sitting and watching the demonstration. No on-screen text or logos are present.
